Message from the Chairman of the Board of Trustees

Welcome to ISTUN!

We decided to establish Istanbul Health and Technology University with the experience we have gained in the health sector for more than 30 years and the know-how provided by sector collaborations. Our aim is to strengthen and accelerate the projects that benefit the society by transferring our experience to you young people within the framework of the 4th generation university understanding.

We aim to raise you as individuals who aim to benefit the society, produce research-oriented innovation and technology, question what they have learned, and make research and continuous development a way of life in our university, which adopts the understanding of a brand new foundation university that does not aim to make profit and aims to train human resources for the sector and society.

Your dreams will shed light on our path and shape our future. We will not only specialize our students in their professional fields, but also encourage you to expand your horizons by motivating you to work in social responsibility projects and various branches of art. As the management and academic units of Istanbul Health and Technology University, we will not only provide you with a university diploma, but also push the limits of your imagination and open paths where you can always dream more and take firm steps to realize these dreams.

We believe... ISTUN management, academic staff and students will work hand in hand to develop projects within our university and bring these projects to the society and industry.

Our great leader Mustafa Kemal Atatürk said, "My spiritual heritage is science and reason. If those who want to follow me after me accept the guidance of reason and science on this basic axis, they will be my spiritual heirs." We have also vowed to follow this path.

We know that as the ISTUN family, we will raise world-leading scientists and researchers in the field of health, scientists who provide innovative treatments to patients and share their discoveries with society.

Contributing to science at a universal level will be a source of great happiness and pride for us.

Yours sincerely...

Specialized Pharmacist Mahmut Bilgiç

Chairman of the Board of Trustees
